dialogue_text: we went to school in the sea. The master was an old Turtle—we used to call him Tortoise—
source_excerpt: "When we were little," the Mock Turtle went on at last, more calmly, though still sobbing a little now and then, "we went to school in the sea. The master was an old Turtle—we used to call him Tortoise—"
